summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Post-Training Evaluation feature. All 4 new backend APIs working (100%). Frontend post-evaluation form with 8 sections, NPS 0-10, facilitator cards, and submission flow all working correctly. Pre-training assessment form at / and /assessment NOT broken.

success_rate.backend: 100% - All 12 tests passed (4 post-eval endpoints + 5 existing endpoints)

seed_data_creation: Test submissions created via API tests (TEST_ prefixed emails)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-evaluation feature fully tested. Backend has 4 new endpoints: POST/GET /api/post-eval-drafts, POST/GET /api/post-evaluations. Frontend has 8-section form at /post-evaluation with email dialog, NPS 0-10, facilitator rating cards (navy/teal backgrounds), and redirects to /post-eval-thank-you on submit. Pre-training form at / and /assessment remains functional.
